title: Professional Tyre Pressure Gauge Air Tyre Inflator with 0.5m Hose & Twin Push-On Connector, Die-Cast Aluminum, Handheld for Truck/Car/Bike
features: Die-cast aluminum body and all copper joints, main body protected by an impact-resistant rubber sleeve
Linear pressure scale, two unit pressure gauge: PSI and Bar
One-button operation with a press-sensitive lever: fully press to inflate, press halfway to deflate, and release to measure pressure
Magnifying reading window: clear and easy to read
0.5M wire sheathed hose, flexible and durable
description: Product Description Crafted with a solid die-cast aluminum body and a shock-absorbing ABS cover, this inflator is built to withstand bumps and drops for long-lasting durability. It features clear, magnified readouts in both PSI and Bar units, making it easy to monitor tire pressure accurately. The 3-in-1 design lets you inflate, deflate, and measure tire pressure with a single, convenient tool—ideal for any car or truck. Equipped with a hand-held chuck, rubber grips, and shock-absorbing bumpers, it ensures ease of use and a comfortable, secure hold. The slim, classic handheld design is both stylish and practical, making it a perfect choice for car enthusiasts and mechanics alike. Product Features Durable and Reliable Construction Built with a tough die-cast aluminum body , all-copper joints, an impact-resistant rubber sleeve, and a battery-free operation The flexible 0.5m wire-sheathed hose ensures enhanced durability and resistance to kinking. Clear and Accurate Readings Features a linear pressure gauge with dual units (PSI and Bar) displayed through a magnifying lens window Providing clear, precise readings for accurate tire pressure monitoring Effortless 3-in-1 Operation The press-sensitive lever allows one-button control: fully press to inflate, press halfway to deflate, and release to measure pressure. Simple and intuitive for both professionals and beginners.
